function.name: _app_get_draft_define_count
function.description:
Get the quantity statistics of Define objects in the [Draft Version] of the current application.

[Purpose]
- Determine if there are unpublished modifications
- Quickly check the scale of changes before publishing
- Display draft modification quantity prompt

[Description]
- Only read draft version
- Do not read published version
- Do not modify any data
- Return statistics of the number of objects of each type and the total number

[Important Semantics]
- If there is no difference between the current draft and the published version, the quantity should be returned as 0
- This interface is only used for statistics and does not return specific structure content
